data.body: Update two validate-work skill files: (1) plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/prompts/tickets-health.md lines 8 and 21: replace 'the tk wrapper' with 'the ticket CLI' in both occurrences. Line 8: 'This prompt uses plugin scripts (validate-issues.sh, ticket) which are inherently portable.' Line 21: 'Note: ticket is a CLI command available in PATH — no config key needed.' (2) plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/SKILL.md line 170: remove 'tk commands that emit structured counts' from the comment, leaving 'runs validate-issues.sh and emits structured counts'. test-exempt: no conditional logic, pure skill/prompt text edits. Regression verified by RED test bbfb-ce09.
